title: Messaging Outcomes and Delivery Evidence in Go · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs messaging outcomes and delivery evidence in go from producer, broker, queue, delivery, Go runtime, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one protocol or concurrency misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a typed outcome and ownership evidence record after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define producer, consumer, operator, security, accessibility, latency, loss, duplicate, and recovery evidence for one messaging outcome; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Distinguish commands, events, notifications, documents, and queries by ownership, audience, expected handling, and change semantics; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

State at-most-once, at-least-once, effectively-once effect, ordering, and durability claims without promising impossible end-to-end exactly-once delivery; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Outcome Evidence Contract
steps.instruction:
Order the Outcome Evidence Contract RabbitMQ and Go messaging evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Outcome Evidence Contract.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Outcome Evidence Contract assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For RabbitMQ and Go Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Outcome Evidence Contract, keep Outcome Evidence Contract connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.text: A review Go messaging team handles case 4399 during stream-versus-queue architecture board. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate local publication, broker custody, and observable stakeholder effect; prove cleanup under a single deadline and cancellation cause; then make one state notification stale after recovery generation changes. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define producer, consumer, operator, security, accessibility, latency, loss, duplicate, and recovery evidence for one messaging outcome; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Outcome Evidence Contract has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

options.text: Declare RabbitMQ and Go outcome, topology, ownership, identity, and byte, time, attempt, and concurrency budgets for the review Outcome Evidence Contract case
Predict RabbitMQ and Go publish, route, custody, delivery, effect, failure, cancellation, and recovery outcomes for the review Outcome Evidence Contract case
Run the smallest deterministic RabbitMQ and Go messaging model and retain inspectable changed-case evidence for the review Outcome Evidence Contract case
Inject one changed RabbitMQ and Go failure, verify bounded cleanup, and state live-broker transfer limits for the review Outcome Evidence Contract case

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Plan browser models, Go compilation, vet, table tests, fuzzing, race and leak checks, disposable RabbitMQ integration, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production transfer gates.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Transfer Evidence Plan, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Transfer Evidence Plan precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Transfer Evidence Plan, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A review Go messaging team handles case 7800 during Go publisher supervisor losing one state notification. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate local publication, broker custody, and observable stakeholder effect; bound payload, queue, confirm-ledger, and handler bytes; then cancel the parent context while a result is still ambiguous. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Plan browser models, Go compilation, vet, table tests, fuzzing, race and leak checks, disposable RabbitMQ integration, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production transfer gates.

For RabbitMQ and Go Record what required effort · Review Transfer Evidence Plan, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A deterministic browser model or ordinary go test run proves broker replication, goroutine scheduling, and network recovery behavior.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.
